headline: Let's build something useful, reliable, and ready to ship.
body: For recruiter reviews, internship opportunities, freelance projects, dashboards, backend work, or practical IT support, send a short note and I will reply as soon as I can.

placeholders.name: Your name
placeholders.subject: Internship, freelance project, or technical help
placeholders.message: Tell me about the role, project, timeline, stack, or anything useful.
